S.FORM: O Takangkodesiatin (Holam: 大港口的夏天, ira ko ) cacey kamoko'ay a tilifi ega i Taywan. Misanga' Pipahosoan to tilifi no Yen-cu-min ci ina to tilifi ega. Mipasadak to 2016 a miheca. Mianingaya a patingso^
S.PHON: o~u takaŋko~uɬ~ɮəsiatin (ħo~uɾam: ******, ira ko~u ) ʦaʦəj kamo~uko~uʡaj a tiɾifi ə*a i tajwan. misaŋaʡ pipaħo~uso~uan to~u tiɾifi no~u jən-ʦo~u~u-min ʦi ina to~u tiɾifi ə*a. mipasaɬ~ɮak to~u **** a miħəʦa. mianiŋaja a patiŋso~uʔ
S.FORM: O Takangkodesiatin (Holam: 大港口的夏天, ira ko ) cacey kamoko'ay a tilifi ega i Taywan. Misanga' Pipahosoan to tilifi no Yen-cu-min ci ina to tilifi ega. Mipasadak to 2016 a miheca. Mianingaya a patingso^
S.PHON: o~u takaŋko~uɬ~ɮəsiatin (ħo~uɾam: ******, ira ko~u ) ʦaʦəj kamo~uko~uʡaj a tiɾifi ə*a i tajwan. misaŋaʡ pipaħo~uso~uan to~u tiɾifi no~u jən-ʦo~u~u-min ʦi ina to~u tiɾifi ə*a. mipasaɬ~ɮak to~u **** a miħəʦa. mianiŋaja a patiŋso~uʔ
